replaceString:
<script>
(function() {
    if (window.__TAVO_MEMO_PREVIEW__ && window.__TAVO_MEMO_PREVIEW__.base && window.__TAVO_MEMO_PREVIEW__.ui) {
        window.__TAVO_MEMO_PREVIEW__.base.open();
        return;
    }

    var tv = window.tavo;
    if (!tv || !tv.regex || !tv.regex.all) return;

    // 用 entry.name 匹配（Tavo 导入时 scriptName 会映射到 name）
    var moduleOrder = ['TavoMemo-Pack2-00-BaseCore', 'TavoMemo-Pack2-01-LightPages', 'TavoMemo-Pack2-02-MemoryStarmap'];
    var scripts = {};

    tv.regex.all().then(async function(list) {
        for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
            var item = list[i];
            var entries = Array.isArray(item.entries) ? item.entries : null;
            if (!entries && item.id) {
                try {
                    var detail = await tv.regex.get(item.id);
                    entries = detail ? detail.entries : [];
                } catch (e) {}
            }
            if (!entries) continue;

            for (var j = 0; j < entries.length; j++) {
                var entry = entries[j];
                if (entry.findRegex && entry.findRegex.includes('第五季果汁记忆系统')) {
                    // 用 entry.name 存储
                    var entryName = entry.name || '';
                    if (entryName && entry.replaceString) {
                        scripts[entryName] = entry.replaceString;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // 按顺序执行
        for (var k = 0; k < moduleOrder.length; k++) {
            var name = moduleOrder[k];
            if (scripts[name]) {
                try {
                    new Function(scripts[name])();
                    console.log('已加载: ' + name);
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('加载失败: ' + name, e);
                }
            } else {
                console.warn('未找到: ' + name);
            }
        }

        var app = window.__TAVO_MEMO_PREVIEW__;
        if (app && app.ui && app.ui.renderAll) {
            app.ui.renderAll();
        }
        if (app && app.base && app.base.open) {
            app.base.open();
        }
    });
})();
</script>
